note: $136B in aid over 20 years — built an army that collapsed in 11 days (Aug 2021). SIGAR found $19B wasted on "failed or abandoned" projects. Taliban now controls $7B+ in US military equipment left behind.
controversies: Total waste: SIGAR documented billions in fraud and waste. Afghan papers revealed officials knew the war was unwinnable. $7B in equipment abandoned to Taliban.
